mapper.select: SELECT * FROM biz_house WHERE house_no = #{houseNo} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM biz_house WHERE landlord_id = #{landlordId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM biz_house WHERE landlord_id = #{landlordId} AND status = #{status} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM biz_house WHERE city = #{city} AND status = #{status} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM biz_house WHERE city = #{city} AND district = #{district} AND status = #{status} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM biz_house WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 2 ORDER BY view_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM biz_house WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 2 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_house SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE biz_house SET favorite_count = favorite_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE biz_house SET favorite_count = favorite_count - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND favorite_count > 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM biz_house WHERE landlord_id = #{landlordId} AND deleted = #{deleted}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM biz_house WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = #{deleted}
